prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约6693、10359、8772、36912、12593名。2024年因新高考首年出现特殊类型专业组，位次异常扩大至36912名；2025年回归至12593名，较2023年（8772名）后移约3821名，近两年基准位次在12000–13000名区间；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年62人、2022年63人、2023年63人、2024年65人、2025年69人；2026年计划74人，较2025年增加5人，扩招约7.2%，招生名额增加对竞争格局产生一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第66名，排名稳定，在财经类院校中位居前列；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第92位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度处于中等水平；近年无投档线断档记录；应用经济学A+、工商管理A、统计学A-，三大核心学科实力突出，与该校金融学类、统计学类、工商管理类等招生专业高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工类专业2024年社会热度评估为高热推荐/推荐，对物理类考生有较强吸引力；本省2026年物理类考生估算约26.9万人，较2025年（26.0万）增加约3.3%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12593名、2026年物理类招生计划扩招约7.2%（使位次趋向后移）、本省物理类考生增加约3.3%（使位次趋向后移）以及计算机/电子信息等理工类专业热度偏高等因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应叠加，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约13171名，区间12671–13671名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 6693, 10359, 8772, 36912, and 12593 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, a special type of major group appeared, causing the ranking to abnormally expand to 36912; in 2025, it returned to 12593, moving back about 3821 places compared to 2023 (8772). The baseline ranking in recent two years is in the range of 12000–13000. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 62 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 69 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 74, an increase of 5 from 2025, an expansion of about 7.2%. The increase in enrollment places has a certain mitigating effect on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking, and is among the top in financial and economic institutions. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (average evaluation), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. There have been no records of admission score line breaks in recent years. Applied Economics is A+, Business Administration is A, and Statistics is A-, with outstanding strength in the three core disciplines, which highly correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Statistics, and Business Administration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity evaluation for science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering is high recommendation/recommendation, which strongly attracts Physics Category candidates. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (260,000), leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 12593 in 2025, the expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan by about 7.2% in 2026 (causing the ranking to shift backward), the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates by about 3.3% (causing the ranking to shift backward), and the high popularity of science and engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect are superimposed. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13171, with a range of 12671–13671.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12500), you can focus on reaching for top majors such as Accounting (CPA direction), Actuarial Science, and Finance; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 13500), you should mainly fill in Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1204, 1613, 1125, 11584, and 1742 respectively. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination, special type major groups such as Sino-foreign cooperative education appeared, causing an abnormal expansion of the ranking to 11584; in 2025, it returned to 1742, moving back about 617 places compared to 2023 (1125), with the baseline ranking fluctuating around 1700 in recent two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi History Category was 41 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.9%, and the tightening of enrollment quotas has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (65th in 2025), with stable rankings, leading among finance and economics institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (average evaluation), with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal signals of application attention; there have been no records of admission cutoff line breaks in recent years; Applied Economics is rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, with outstanding strength in three core disciplines, highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, and Accounting, providing sustained appeal to candidates interested in finance and economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity assessment of Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics majors was 'divergent and wait-and-see', slightly warming compared to 2023 but still showing divergence overall; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated 123,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (119,000), slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1742, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan reduction of about 7.9% (which tends to move the ranking forward), the increase of History Category candidates in the province by about 3.3% (which tends to move the ranking backward), and the divergent and wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, the reduction effect is slightly stronger than the candidate increase effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1640, with a range of 1345–1935.
